content:
Welcome to my site! I’ll be writing here about math, optimization, and whatever else I’m working on. This website is the product of continuous prodding from both my close friend Matthew Ferrari and colleague/wordsmith Lucas Hunter.
Recently, I’ve been spending a lot of time on linear programming to prepare for mixed integer linear programming research I’ll be performing over the summer at NCSU. I’ll post about this topic as time permits!

title: Hello World!
